source_meta.source_document: GLOBAL AP IMPL and Patient Information Leaflet for Shoulder Joint Replacement

systems.system_notes: Combined anatomic/reverse shoulder construct anchored to official DePuy GLOBAL AP inventory documents and the patient-information leaflet listing Global Advantage and Delta Xtend.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes GLOBAL AP instrument inventory supports a dedicated shoulder arthroplasty instrumentation workflow applicable to the Global Advantage / Delta XTEND construct.

components.component_notes: Official GLOBAL AP implant inventory documents the humeral stem family.
Official GLOBAL AP implant inventory documents humeral head options.
The Delta XTEND reverse shoulder platform includes glenosphere components as part of the reverse construct.
The Delta XTEND reverse shoulder platform includes glenoid baseplate fixation components.

products.product_notes: Catalog code explicitly listed in the official GLOBAL AP implant inventory PDF.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current source set confirms the shoulder construct and exposes some GLOBAL AP implant codes, but this pass does not expand the full Delta XTEND reverse implant matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper reverse-shoulder inventory or IFU pass is needed for the full Delta XTEND coded product matrix.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction adds one reliable GLOBAL AP coded product while keeping the broader reverse construct at component-family level.
